title: Python/Rust packet_hash type mismatch breaks cross-impl metrics
description: Python NodeMetrics uses set[str] of 32-char hex strings for packet_hashes_sent/received (see metrics.py:45,96). Rust hetero_node uses HashSet<[u8; 16]> bytes. JSON exports incompatible formats. This prevents reliable cross-impl consistency verification intended by the packet_hash standardization. Affects sim/metrics.py, hetero_node.rs:26-27,146-178, export_metrics. New bug surfaced by codereview.
